title: Review-plan workflow: immutable evidence to human plan

system.name: Agent-owned review-plan workflow
system.description: Trusted orchestration converts immutable review evidence into a human-owned plan. The operator and human gate stay outside the C4 v1 container boundary.

containers.name: Trusted workflow
containers.description: Validates review-task status, refuses to overwrite an existing plan, and requires exact finding coverage with all dispositions pending.

containers.name: Full agent sessions
containers.description: Reopen exact review evidence, write the candidate fix plan, and validate it through full agent sessions. No direct LLM calls.

containers.name: Persisted artifacts
containers.description: Supplies immutable review.md and task.md, then stores only updated task metadata and human-owned fix-plan.md; source remains read-only.

relationships.description: Reads evidence and publishes the plan
